Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/ITC.asp

# SBDC International Trade Center Routing Process

## When to route
Route to the International Trade Center when the entrepreneur wants to export, sell globally, research foreign markets, prepare export loan applications, understand documentation/financing, or assess international readiness.

## Best-fit stages
- Validation: testing international demand or target markets.
- Launch/Operations: preparing export processes and documentation.
- Growth: entering new countries or scaling international sales.

## BOSS guardrail
Do not provide final customs, export-control, sanctions, legal, tax, or trade-compliance advice. Use the ITC and relevant professional/official resources.
